stemHtml: An aircraft is approaching over deep water to a runway which lies perpendicular to a rocky shoreline. The sky is blue and cloudless. What will be the pilot’s perception?

options.a: He/she may experience a black hole illusion, so he/she needs to rely on his/her instruments.
options.c: He/she feels like being too high, which may result in a short landing.
options.d: He/she feels like being too low, which may result in a long landing.
